channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: All passengers on hantavirus-hit ship considered high-risk contacts, EU health agency says - Reuters
item.description:
1. All passengers on hantavirus-hit ship considered high-risk contacts, EU health agency says  Reuters
  2. The country where lethal hantavirus cases are on the rise. Experts blame climate change  CNN
  3. Hantavirus-stricken cruise ship arrives in Tenerife  NBC News
  4. CDC says threat of widespread outbreak of hantavirus remains low  NPR
  5. Hantavirus Cruise Passengers Will Disembark Sunday (Latest Updates)  Forbes

item.title: Vladimir Putin suggests Ukraine war is ‘coming to an end’ | Russia - The Guardian
item.description:
1. Vladimir Putin suggests Ukraine war is ‘coming to an end’ | Russia  The Guardian
  2. Putin says he thinks Ukraine conflict 'coming to an end'  BBC
  3. Putin says he believes Ukrainian conflict nearing end amid scaled-down Victory Day celebrations  CBS News
  4. Putin says Ukraine war 'heading to an end' despite ceasefire violations  France 24
  5. Putin says he thinks the war with Ukraine 'is coming to an end' as Trump-brokered 3-day ceasefire begins  Fox News

item.title: Venice Biennale opens without a jury amid strife over Russian and Israeli participation - AP News
item.description:
1. Venice Biennale opens without a jury amid strife over Russian and Israeli participation  AP News
  2. Without Its Expert Jury, Venice Biennale Lets the Public Choose Its Prize Winners  The New York Times
  3. At the Venice Biennale I saw anger at Russia and Israel – and its leadership pretending everything was fine  The Guardian
  4. Biennale Arte 2026 | Voting Procedures for the Visitors’ Lions  La Biennale di Venezia

item.title: Russia holds downsized Victory Day parade - Al Jazeera
item.description:
1. Russia holds downsized Victory Day parade  Al Jazeera
  2. Steve Rosenberg: This year's Victory Day parade in Moscow felt very different  BBC
  3. Russia holds scaled-down Victory Day parade as temporary ceasefire in Ukraine war takes effect  CNN
  4. A Scaled-Back Victory Day Parade Shows Putin’s Growing Vulnerability in Ukraine War  The New York Times
  5. Putin Presides Over Downsized Military Parade as Ukraine War Drags On  WSJ

item.title: Car bomb attack and ambush in northwest Pakistan kills at least 12 police - Al Jazeera
item.description:
1. Car bomb attack and ambush in northwest Pakistan kills at least 12 police  Al Jazeera
  2. Twelve Pakistani police officers killed in car bombing and shootout  Reuters
  3. Death toll rises to 14 in Pakistan suicide attack. Pakistan Taliban splinter group claims blast  WRAL
  4. Three Pakistani police officers killed in car bombing, more casualties feared  The Economic Times
  5. Police foil suicide attack on Bannu post; at least 2 personnel martyred  Dawn

item.title: Indonesian rescuers retrieve body from Mount Dukono as search continues - The Guardian
item.description:
1. Indonesian rescuers retrieve body from Mount Dukono as search continues  The Guardian
  2. Mount Dukono: Multiple hikers killed, others rescued after volcano erupts in Indonesia  CNN
  3. Two Singaporeans confirmed dead in Indonesia volcano eruption, bodies found  Reuters
  4. Search for two Singaporeans at Mount Dukono hampered by eruptions and rain  Yahoo
  5. 3 Hikers Dead After Volcano Erupts in Indonesia  The New York Times

item.title: Peter Magyar Takes Over as Hungary’s Leader From Viktor Orban - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Peter Magyar Takes Over as Hungary’s Leader From Viktor Orban  The New York Times
  2. Péter Magyar Led Hungarians out of Autocracy. Where Will He Take Them Now?  The New Yorker
  3. Hungary’s New PM Magyar Demands President Quit in Showdown  Bloomberg.com
  4. As Hungary gets a new leader, the ‘trauma’ sinks in for Orbán loyalists  The Seattle Times
  5. Péter Magyar sworn in as Hungary’s prime minister ending 16-year Orbán era  The Guardian

item.title: Fragile Iran ceasefire appears to hold as Iran warns the U.S. against attacks on its oil tankers and other ships - PBS
item.description:
1. Fragile Iran ceasefire appears to hold as Iran warns the U.S. against attacks on its oil tankers and other ships  PBS
  2. Iran war live: IRGC warns US against attacks on ships; Israel bombs Lebanon  Al Jazeera
  3. Live Updates: U.S. awaits Iran's response on peace deal as month-long ceasefire holds  CBS News
  4. Day 71 of Middle East conflict — US awaits response from Iran on proposal to end war  CNN
  5. Iran’s Revolutionary Guards threaten US sites in Middle East if tankers come under fire  The Guardian

item.title: U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer faces calls to resign after disastrous local elections - CBS News
item.description:
1. U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer faces calls to resign after disastrous local elections  CBS News
  2. Labour MPs have put Starmer on notice after election battering. Can he turn it around?  BBC
  3. Britain’s Electorate Is ‘Splintering.’ Can Its System Stand the Strain?  The New York Times
  4. Nigel Farage’s triumph is not quite what it seems  The Economist
  5. Nigel Farage will need to be 22 times more efficient to win the next general election  politico.eu

item.title: UK deploys warship to Middle East with eye on potential Hormuz mission - Reuters

item.title: Australian far-right party wins first lower house seat - DW.com
item.description:
1. Australian far-right party wins first lower house seat  DW.com
  2. Australia's right-wing One Nation party scores historic parliamentary win  BBC
  3. Nationals MP Colin Boyce says he’s considering move to One Nation after ‘wake-up call’ in Farrer byelection  The Guardian
  4. Australia's Trump-aligned populists vow to fight mass migration after winning first lower house seat  Reuters
  5. One Nation Wins Australia Special Election, Claiming Seat in Lower House  The New York Times

item.title: Trump says Russia and Ukraine have agreed to his request for a 3-day ceasefire - NPR
item.description:
1. Trump says Russia and Ukraine have agreed to his request for a 3-day ceasefire  NPR

item.title: After Frederiksen Falls Short in Denmark, Right-Leaning Politician Is Asked to Form Government - The New York Times
item.description:
1. After Frederiksen Falls Short in Denmark, Right-Leaning Politician Is Asked to Form Government  The New York Times
  2. Danish rightwing leader asked to form government after Frederiksen fails to form coalition  The Guardian
  3. Denmark's right-wing defence minister to lead government formation talks  Reuters
  4. Danish deputy PM to lead coalition talks after Frederiksen’s effort fails  politico.eu
  5. Danish Prime Minister Fredriksen fails to form coalition, liberal takes over  Euractiv

item.title: Trump's feuds, tensions with allies likely to outlast Iran war - Reuters
item.description:
1. Trump's feuds, tensions with allies likely to outlast Iran war  Reuters
  2. Trump ‘right to be outraged’ by Europe’s betrayal on Iran, says former Thatcher advisor  Fox News
  3. In Europe, and now Asia, confidence in US support wavers  The Christian Science Monitor
  4. Fallout from the Iran war may include a NATO where the U.S. is no longer its leader  NPR
  5. Rising tensions signal deepening rift between US and European allies  سانا

item.title: Rubio backs NATO in Rome as US-Italy tensions simmer - politico.eu
item.description:
1. Rubio backs NATO in Rome as US-Italy tensions simmer  politico.eu
  2. Rubio Challenges European Allies to Make NATO More Useful  WSJ
  3. Rubio questions allies' support on Iran following Italy talks  Reuters
  4. Rubio Meets Meloni as U.S.-Italy Relations Strained and Trump’s Attacks on Pope  The New York Times
  5. Nato refusing US permission to use bases is ‘a problem’, says Rubio after Meloni meeting – as it happened  The Guardian
